code.description: A machine-readable error code from the Canned Messages table, that will enable the API Consumers code to handle this type of error

title.description: An error title from the Canned Messages table with a 1:1 correspondence to the error code. This may be localized

detail.description: An easy-to-read explanation specific to this occurrence of the problem. It should give the API consumer an idea of what went wrong and how to recover from it. Like the title, this field’s value can be localized.

parameter.description: The key of the URI path or query parameter that caused the error

pointer.description: A JSON Pointer [RFC6901] to the associated entity in the request body that caused this error

example.description: A sample input to guide the user when resolving this issue

documentation.description: A link to a web page or file with further documentation to help the API consumer resolve this error

relationships.description: Indicate relationships from one entity to many other entities of any kind (e.g. from one passenger to their flight segments).
relationships.title: Relationships

collection.description: The details of the related items

items.description: Relationship allows to cross reference 2 entities via Link and/or id .
items.title: Relationship

ref.description: Local reference of the related resource

targetSchema.description: The targetSchema would be an instance of definition to be used for building the associated API Request operation

targetMediaType.description: Related to "targetSchema", to be specified in case the media type is different for the referenced API request

hrefSchema.description: type ( format, type, patterns, enum) definition for each URI parameters.

methods.description: HTTP methods supported by the sibling URI

rel.description: Expose the type of relation between the current entity and the describe entity : https://www.iana.org/assignments/link-relations/link-relations.xhtml
